summary: Gift Cards Supabase Migration - All tests passed. Backend: 8/8 tests (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Gift card purchase returns checkout_url from Mollie. Gift card validation (DV-TEST0001) works via both /api/gift-card/validate and /api/discount/validate endpoints.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Gift card Supabase migration fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/gift-card/purchase (creates gift card + Mollie payment, returns checkout_url), POST /api/gift-card/validate (validates DV-XXXX codes), POST /api/discount/validate (also handles DV- codes as gift cards). Frontend: /cadeaubon page works with all form fields.

Amount buttons (€25, €50, €75, €100) work and update total
Form fields present: recipient name, recipient email, message, sender name, sender email
